who: accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month
offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll tax filings/month, manual data entry causes delays in audit readiness. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and report generation.
problem: Difficulty in generating timely and accurate payroll tax reports for audits.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
DM outreach to 20-50 firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try data extraction and report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with the one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Update progress weekly in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing payroll data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
